title: Doom's Markers
description: All new land markers without a whole map mod!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3999f8b08261e9c070870271048bd477a6fe15a1.png)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/810752039470235688?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&labelColor=grey&color=green)](https://discord.imjustdoom.com)
[![X (formerly Twitter) Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/ImJustDoom?style=for-the-badge&logo=x&label=Follow!&color=gray)](https://twitter.com/ImJustDoom)
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Backers-%20?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&color=gray)](https://ko-fi.com/justdoom) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/JustDoom/Dooms-Markers?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/JustDoom/Dooms-Markers)

Do you want to mark locations without needing a whole map mod? Want to track your Death locations without any hassle? Want to actually know how far that Buried Treasure map will take you? Want to customise your Markers?

## Features

- Place your own Markers
- Death Markers
- Customise your Markers colour and icon using items!
- Display distance to Markers
- Toggle Markers with `M`
- Create Markers from Map Banners or tracked locations like Buried Treasure or Wooldland Mansions!

Feel free to join my [Discord server](https://discord.imjustdoom.com) and give me any suggestions for new features

---

Create Markers with the `Use` key

![Create Marker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4KRQdCs4/images/c45a3b7e8518b1d192a12b7581840d9648e82c5d.gif)

Customise a Marker with the Middle mouse button to change the icon or right click with Dye to change the colour. While holding the `Use` key

![Customise the Marker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4KRQdCs4/images/7fd31b024aca9246c355480f2e603186b1e216eb.gif)

Scroll through the icon options while holding the `Use` key

![Scroll through icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4KRQdCs4/images/229fa5ef1eb690106ec6c40346f559c6bd27b4f7.gif)

Delete the Marker by punching it while holding the `Use` key

![Delete Marker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4KRQdCs4/images/029bc36d774ae2987340d3d2e43f3407822bdd4b.gif)

Spawns a Death Marker when you die!

![Death Marker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4KRQdCs4/images/2855785a0e85f46b78ff47cfd3e214004dde44f0.gif)

---

### Planned

- Share Markers with other players
- Config file for options

## Usage

The mod revolved around the `Use` key. This key defaults to the `GRAVE` key or `` ` ``.
The toggle key defaults to `M` but these are both configurable through Minecrafts Keybinds menu.

### Mod Requirements

This mod does not require any extra dependencies!

## FAQ

**Can I use this mod in my modpack?**

Absolutely! If you do so, I would love to know about it too :D

**Will this be backported to before 1.20.1?**

Unless a lot of people request this, probably not.

**Will this be updated past 1.20.1?**

Absolutely. I am just making this version stable first and then I will update it to newer versions.

## Support

Support can be provided on my [discord server](https://discord.gg/ydGK5jYV6t) or you can report any bugs for the mod on the GitHub repository [here](https://github.com/JustDoom/VillagerInABucket/issues). For the plugin please use [this one](https://github.com/JustDoom/VillagerInABukkit/issues)
